untranslatable_reason: Double Bottom pattern requires multi-bar state tracking (identifying two distinct bottoms 2-7 weeks apart with specific price relationships). The conversion table lacks swing/pivot detection and memory of prior swing points. The 4% similarity threshold between two bottoms, pattern height measurement (10%+), and volume distribution analysis between left/right bottoms cannot be expressed with single-bar indicators. A lookback window or pattern-recognition library is needed.
